site.name: KEA Partners
site.subdescription: Find everything you need to promote our developments: brochures, artwork, availability, and more.

development.title: Developments
development.description: Select the High-End & Resort Living you are interested in to access all available resources: data sheets, pricing, brochures, social media content, and more.

brandedResidences.title: Branded Residences
brandedResidences.description: Luxury residences integrated into branded resorts that combine exclusive design, high-end hotel services, and a sophisticated lifestyle.

faq_item.title: Where can I access the marketing materials for the developments?
faq_item.text: Within this Resource Center you will find a repository organized by development. There you can download brochures, presentations, technical data sheets, videos, social media content, and more. You can also request customized materials if needed.
